_meta.single_field_update: yes — sending only one field in fields[] updates just that field and leaves others intact
_meta.boolean_repr: string '1' / '0' (canonical write repr). Wire also accepts 'true'/'false' but '1'/'0' is canonical.
_meta.redirect_type_NOT_supported_by_head_app: Redirect307 — schema accepts the string, but the head-app resolver does not honour it. Remove from operator UI.
_meta.rename_via_updateItem_name: FAILS with EXEC_INVALID_TYPE — name is not a valid UpdateItemInput field. Use renameItem mutation instead.
